# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance and bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 brings performance improvements, a memory-leak fix, and Nano Server font support. This release fixes a pixel-buffer memory leak in the SKImage raster failure path, reduces allocations in text encoding, speeds up SKRuntimeEffect uniform lookups, and adds FreeType-backed font support for Windows Nano Server.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Pixel-buffer memory leak fixed in SKImage.Create** — A CoTaskMem-allocated pixel buffer leaked when SKImage.Create failed to create a raster image; the buffer is now correctly freed on the failure path. ([#4455](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4455))

## API Surface

- **FreeType font support for Windows Nano Server** — SkiaSharp now uses FreeType as its font backend on Windows Nano Server, enabling text rendering in environments where GDI fonts are unavailable. — ❤️ [@jeffska](https://github.com/jeffska) ([#4280](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4280))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Reduced allocations in GetEncodedText** — The null-terminated path in GetEncodedText no longer allocates an intermediate string, lowering GC pressure in text-heavy rendering workloads. ([#4498](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4498))
- **Faster SKRuntimeEffect uniform lookups** — The uniform lookup map inside SKRuntimeEffectUniforms is now pre-sized to the known uniform count, eliminating repeated rehashing during effect evaluation. ([#4512](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4512))

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!
